---
title: "Offset Headings — Combined Rules"
subtitle: "Document-level offset combined with per-heading offsets, max-level cap, and cascade depth"
author:
  - name: "Mickaël CANOUIL, _Ph.D._"
    orcid: "0000-0002-3396-4549"
    url: "https://mickael.canouil.fr"
format:
  html:
    output-file: example-combine
    embed-resources: true
  typst:
    output-file: example-combine-typst
    papersize: a4
    margin:
      x: 2.5cm
      y: 2.5cm
format-links:
  - html
  - typst
number-sections: true
filters:
  - offset-headings
extensions:
  offset-headings:
    by: 1
---

This fixture exercises the rules that combine the document-level offset with per-heading offsets, with the cap on the deepest reachable level, and with the cascade depth limit.

## Document-only Shift

This level-2 heading has no attribute, so it receives the document-level offset only.
It renders as a level-3 heading because `extensions.offset-headings.by` is `1`.

## Per-heading Addition {offset-headings-by="1"}

This level-2 heading combines the document offset (`1`) and its per-heading offset (`1`).
It renders as a level-4 heading.

### Cascaded Subsection

This level-3 heading inherits the active cascade, so it also receives `1 + 1`.
It renders as a level-5 heading.

## Negative Per-heading Cancels Document Offset {offset-headings-by="-1"}

The document offset (`1`) and the per-heading offset (`-1`) cancel.
This level-2 heading stays at level 2.

## Capped Combined Level {offset-headings-by="2" offset-headings-max-level="4" offset-headings-depth="1"}

Without the cap, this level-2 heading would become a level-5 heading (`2 + 1 + 2`).
The `max-level` of `4` caps the combined level, so it renders as level 4.

### Cascaded and Capped Subsection

This level-3 heading is inside the cascade depth limit of `1`.
Without the cap it would become a level-6 heading (`3 + 1 + 2`).
The cap holds it at level 4.

#### Beyond the Cascade Depth

This level-4 heading is beyond the per-heading cascade depth.
It only receives the document offset and renders as level 5.
